advice: Most households only actively watch 2-3 services. Consider rotating: subscribe for one month, binge what you want, cancel, switch to another.
These all have essentially the same catalog. Pick one. If you have YouTube Premium, YouTube Music is included.
Consolidate to one provider. Google Drive gives 15GB free. Most people don't need paid storage at all.
Check if your library card gives free access to news apps. Many libraries include NYT, WSJ digital access.
These membership fees add up fast on top of delivery fees and markups. One is enough — or just call restaurants directly.
YouTube has thousands of free workout videos. If you need structure, one paid app is sufficient.
